rationale: The proposed change to the Tax Code homestead exemption amount has no relation to Elec. Code §254.0611, which governs campaign finance report contents for judicial candidates. No overlap in subject matter.
quote: Sec. 254.0611. ADDITIONAL CONTENTS OF REPORTS BY CERTAIN JUDICIAL CANDIDATES.
_note: No conflict; rule concerns judicial candidate campaign finance disclosures, unrelated to property tax homestead exemption amounts.
